mapper.select: SELECT tor.instructor_id, tor.instructor_name, tor.teaching_years, tor.photo, tor.good_subject, tor.score FROM driving_instructor AS tor WHERE tor.instructor_id = #{instructorId}
SELECT tor.instructor_id, tor.instructor_name, tor.teaching_years, tor.photo, tor.good_subject, tor.score FROM driving_instructor AS tor WHERE tor.`status` = '0'
